meaning: adj.假想的,编造的,虚伪的,习惯上假定的,假想的,假装的,小说中的
examples: The persons and events portrayed in this production are fictitious.
The characters in this story are all fictitious.
The story my mother told me when I was young is fictitious.
Wasn't that a fictitious country featured in 'Duck Soup' or a Three Stooges short?
This is a completely fictitious list price of which they negotiate with private insurers.
